pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage to start pickup or delivery orders, choose locations, and browse featured restaurants and menu categories.

pages.name: Browse Restaurants
pages.description: List and filters for all available restaurants by cuisine, rating, delivery fee, and delivery time.

pages.name: Restaurant Menu
pages.description: Individual restaurant page showing categories like Pizzas, Burgers, Mains, Salads, Desserts, and Drinks.

pages.name: Item Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a specific menu item with options, sizes, toppings, and nutritional info.

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart showing selected items, quantities, prices, and actions to edit or proceed.

pages.name: Pickup Time
pages.description: Step to choose a pickup date and time slot before reviewing the order.

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Checkout page for entering address, payment method, and applying promo codes.

pages.name: Order Review
pages.description: Final review page summarizing items, times, fees, and discounts before placing the order.

pages.name: Order Confirmation
pages.description: Confirmation page with order number, status, and estimated times after placing an order.

pages.name: Order History
pages.description: Account page listing past orders with options to view details or reorder.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Information about the brand, restaurant partners, and ordering platform.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact form and customer support information.

pages.name: Help & FAQ
pages.description: Help center with frequently asked questions and ordering guides.

pages.name: Terms & Privacy
pages.description: Legal information, terms of service, and privacy policy.

promo_codes.description: Save 10% on your order when you apply this promo code at checkout.
Free delivery on eligible delivery orders over $30.
